--void.meaning: Near-black ground the whole core-sample frame floats on (html/body backdrop). Shared verbatim across both screens; the only surface that is NOT a stratum.

--b-head.meaning: Stratum 00 / OKLCH L.900 — bleached bone. The live 'now-seam' surface and the page background. Most-resolved (dug-earth countable ramp); full-finish variant is warmer #E8E1D0.

--b-line.meaning: Stratum 01 / L.833 — headline band. One tonal notch (−0.067 L) older than the seam. Full-finish variant #E2DAC6.

--b-sub.meaning: Stratum 02 / L.765 — subhead/mechanism band. Full-finish variant #DBD1BA.

--b-cal.meaning: Stratum 03 / L.698 — ochre; the calibration readout (soul widget) band. Full-finish variant #D2C6AB.

--b-pend.meaning: Stratum 04 / L.631 — pending/unscored prediction band. Full-finish variant #CABC9D.

--b-miss.meaning: Stratum 05 / L.564 — the burial line (grain ink flips to bone below here); miss prediction band. Full-finish variant #BFAD8A.

--b-hit1.meaning: Stratum 06 / L.496 — umber; first hit prediction band. Full-finish variant #B19E78.

--b-hit2.meaning: Stratum 07 / L.429 — second hit band. Full-finish variant #A4906A.

--b-task.meaning: Stratum 08 / L.362 — 'every task' loop band. Full-finish variant #8C7955.

--b-sess.meaning: Stratum 09 / L.295 — 'every session' loop band. Full-finish variant #6B5A3E.

--b-month.meaning: Stratum 10 / L.227 — peat; 'every month' loop band. Full-finish variant #4E3E2A.

--b-bed.meaning: Stratum 11 / L.160 — near-black peat bedrock; the sealed founding-invariant band, deepest/oldest. Full-finish variant #221A0F.

strata-step.meaning: The excavation gradient is ONE uniform OKLCH lightness ramp: L .900 → .160 over 12 strata, exactly (.900−.160)/11. Depth literally encodes age; this ramp IS the only permitted gradient.

--ink (--grain).meaning: The single constant ink for the light/upper zone — dark umber. Hierarchy comes from PRESSURE (alpha), not a second tone. Full-finish names it --ink #221A0F.

--ink-buried (--grain-buried).meaning: The one place the ink flips: bleached-bone ink writes on the buried/dark strata so only the ground keeps darkening. Same value as stratum 00. Full-finish names it --cream #ECE4D2.

--ink-soft.meaning: Muted-umber mid ink for light-zone secondary text (rail ids/timestamps, labels). Explicit only in full-finish; dug-earth derives this mid via alpha of --ink instead.

--cream-soft.meaning: Pale buried-zone mid ink for secondary text on dark strata. Full-finish only; dug-earth uses alpha of --ink-buried.

ink-pressure-scale.meaning: Text levels in the resolved (dug-earth) model are color-mix alphas of the ONE ink: 80% sub body · 72% loop copy & JSON numbers · 64% rail id · 58% captions/labels · 56% JSON base · 50% timestamp · 46% rail label · 42% JSON braces.

grain-ink-live.meaning: Full-finish only: ghosted live JSONL grain in umber at 46% (heavy cut g6) / 40% (g5) — the torn-ledger texture in the upper strata.

grain-ink-buried.meaning: Full-finish only: ghosted buried JSONL grain in bone at 30/26/20% (d5/d4/d4b), thinning with depth toward bedrock.

headline-ink.meaning: Full-finish hard-coded ink for the display headline and stat numbers (a hair darker than --ink). Dug-earth instead uses var(--grain).

--oxide.meaning: The ONE accent colour beyond depth. Reserved for exactly one family of meanings: a miss, unscored debt, the live 'now' seam, and sealed/destructive states. A second accent is forbidden.

--oxide-lit.meaning: Oxide raised in lightness to stay legible on buried/dark strata (loop index numerals, bedrock accents, dark rail depth numbers + notch).

seam-gradient.meaning: The bright now-seam bar at the very top (3px row). The only horizontal oxide gradient; marks where new records are deposited and above which nothing may sit.

seam-glow.meaning: Oxide shadow under the now-seam — an allowed oxide glow (not a decorative drop-shadow).

deposition-highlight.meaning: Warm-white travelling tick (90px) that sweeps the seam to signify a live append (linear-gradient transparent→this→transparent).

prime-text.meaning: Near-white label on the solid-oxide primary CTA button ('append ▸ Start the loop').

prime-edge.meaning: Darker-oxide bottom edge of the primary button (0 2px 0) — the only ink-pressed button depth; paired glow rgba(181,72,43,.7).

oxide-underline.meaning: Inset oxide highlight bars under emphasized words (headline box .14 · subhead bold .13 · bedrock italic .22) — a hand-drawn marker wash, not a fill.

oxide-tint.meaning: Oxide at low alpha for UI marks: flag border .50 · calibration gap bar .30 · 'actual' dot focus ring .18.

--bed-line.meaning: Light-zone band hairline (1px bottom border between strata). Full-finish value; dug-earth expresses the same as color-mix(--grain 14%).

--bed-line-d.meaning: Buried-zone band hairline — bone at 8% so the rule nearly vanishes in deep strata. Full-finish; dug-earth keeps color-mix(--grain 14%) with the flipped ink.

rail-margin-rule.meaning: The fixed left rail's right border — an oxide-tinted ruled margin separating the 132px ledger rail from the core. Dug-earth: color-mix(oxide 30%)/(oxide-lit 34%).

ruler-notch.meaning: Dug-earth only: one fixed oxide gradation notch on the rail margin at every stratum — the countable notches of the depth ruler.

cal-track.meaning: The calibration scale baseline (predicted-vs-observed). Ticks are 1px × 10px at ink @ 30% at 0/25/50/75/100%.

radius.meaning: No border-radius anywhere — every band, tab, button, and dot is a hard rectangle/square. Rounded corners, floating cards, and drop-shadows are forbidden by the identity.

--font-mono.meaning: The structural grain and default face (set on body). Weights 400/500/600 + italic 400. Carries the real JSONL ledger, 8-char hex ids, ISO timestamps, rail, UI labels, and tabular stat numerals. Heavier cut weights live upper strata; lighter as strata bury.

--font-serif.meaning: The ONE editorial serif (optical-size 9..144; weights 400/500/600 + italic 400/500). Used only for: the wordmark, the single display headline, the loop index numerals, and the bedrock invariant quote. Never for body.

role-wordmark.meaning: 'Recursive Harness' lockup, with a mono uppercase tagline beneath (9.5px / .16em / --ink-soft).

role-headline.meaning: The single display promise headline. Most-resolved (dug-earth, max-width 1140px); full-finish trims to 37px / 1.05 / max-width 812px so the torn grain runs free at right.

role-loop-index.meaning: Large 01/02/03 numerals for the three nested cadence loops. Full-finish is 33px in a 54px column; dug-earth 34px in 58px.

role-bedrock-quote.meaning: The sealed founding-invariant statement at bedrock; italic-bold key phrase with an oxide underline. Full-finish 20px / 1.34.

role-stat-number.meaning: The big calibration figures (scored 176 · hit-rate 80% · Brier 0.16); the '%' is a 18px mono superscript at ink @ 58%.

role-body.meaning: Subhead/mechanism prose and loop descriptions. Full-finish line-height 1.42.

role-jsonl-record.meaning: The four real prediction records (the torn ledger lines); base text at ink @ 56%, braces @ 42%, task value full ink, null values in oxide.

role-rail.meaning: The fixed left rail: record number (depth, 9.5px/.08em oxide), 8-char hex id, ISO-8601 +00:00 timestamp, uppercase label (8px/.06em). Full-finish line-height 1.06 (compressed sediment).

role-microlabel.meaning: All caption/eyebrow/flag/tag text (cal-tag, stat keys, bed-lead, 'unscored → debt' flag). Tracking widens as size shrinks.

size-scale.meaning: The full type ramp actually present. Micro labels 8–9.5; UI/body 10–13; accents jump to 18 (% sup), 20/21 (bedrock), 22 (wordmark), 33/34 (stat & loop index), 37/39 (display headline). Slashed pairs are full-finish/dug-earth.

tracking-scale.meaning: Letter-spacing widens as type shrinks into uppercase labels: tight negatives on serif display (-.012 headline, -.01 wordmark/stat), near-zero on body, wide positives on mono caps (.16 tagline/stat key, .18 loop heading, .2 bedrock eyebrow).

smallcaps-YOUR.meaning: The 'YOUR' emphasis inside the headline is rendered as inline pseudo-small-caps (0.84em + widened tracking).

frame.meaning: Fixed artboard. Mounted on the void with box-shadow 0 40px 120px rgba(0,0,0,.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.5) — the outer frame mount only, NOT a content card shadow.

grid-columns.meaning: Two columns: the 132px ledger rail (ruled margin) + 1308px core sample. Append-only/never-overwritten IS this grid.

grid-rows.meaning: The 13 horizontal strata heights (px): 3 seam · 78 header · 160 headline · 66 subhead · 150 calibration · 33/33/32/32 the four prediction records · 70/60/53 the three loops · 130 bedrock. Bands shrink as they bury (compaction).

content-left-flush.meaning: Constant left padding on every core band — all content is left-flush to one baseline; held by max-width, never a right gutter, so JSONL terminates hard at its natural length (the ragged right edge).

header-pad-right.meaning: Right padding on the header band only (holds the CTA cluster); other bands have zero right padding.

rail-pad.meaning: Rail cell padding (top/right/bottom/left). Full-finish tightens to 7px 9px 0 12px for denser sediment; inter-line gap 2px (full-finish 1px).

state-tab.meaning: The left state mark on each prediction band: FILLED 11px ink square = hit · HOLLOW 1.6px ink border = miss · DASHED 1.6px oxide border = pending (unscored debt). 14px gap to the record.

mark-geometry.meaning: The logo IS a 7-stratum core sample: bars 4px tall, 1px gaps, ragged widths 18/27/14/30/22/26/30, oxide #B5482B seam on top darkening to bedrock — the primitive as mark.

now-dot.meaning: Pulsing oxide #B5482B dot beside 'now' in the rail header — the live seam indicator.

spacing-gaps.meaning: Layout gaps actually used: 13 lockup · 18 CTA cluster · 22 loop row · 40 stat group · 46 calibration columns. Scale widget 430px wide (full-finish 418px).

button-pad.meaning: Primary CTA padding 10×17; the 'unscored → debt' flag chip padding 2×7 with a 1px oxide border. No radius on either.

seam-run.meaning: A 90px warm-white deposition tick sweeps the now-seam left→right forever — signals that records are being appended at the live seam. The only continuous animation.

now-pulse.meaning: The 7px oxide 'now' dot heartbeats — the single live indicator in the rail.

hover-oxide.meaning: The only hover state: the secondary 'See how it works ▸' link shifts its underline and text to oxide. No transition duration; no other motion, no transforms on content.
